title: Sentry MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Sentry MCP Server for Claude

Monitor errors, debug production issues, and track application health

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** Sentry
- **Brand:** Sentry / sentry.io
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `monitoring` `sentry` `debugging` `errors` `devops`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http sentry https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "sentry": {
    "url": "https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http sentry https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp && claude mcp list
